analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet announces a press conference following a G7 leaders' video conference on COVID-19 with EU leaders (von der Leyen and Michel). It is informational, noting EU participation in a G7 call. Evaluation by narrative: EU1 (EU successful story) – not promoted; no mention of historical success or lessons. EU2 (EU united) – not explicitly; no claim of EU unity or solidarity, just attendance. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – not shown; no policies or benefits for citizens are referenced. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – not indicated; no pioneering action or leadership claim. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes) – not relevant; no human rights/democracy content. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – possibly implied by EU engagement in G7 on a global issue (COVID-19), but the tweet does not state contributions, leadership, or outcomes—only that a press conference followed a meeting. Therefore, no narrative is clearly promoted.
